zh.Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Ki: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾利卡頓
zh.Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton於1440年11月1日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉時，他的父親Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton25歲，母親Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford15歲。他於1459年6月2日與Catherine Douglas在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1507年10月7日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉。

zh-hans.Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton于1440年11月1日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉时，他的父亲Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton25岁，母亲Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford15岁。他于1459年6月2日与Catherine Douglas在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1507年10月7日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton was born on 1 November 1440, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton, was 25 and his mother, Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford, was 15. He married Catherine Douglas on 2 June 1459, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 October 1507, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton est né le 1 novembre 1440, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Douglas le 2 juin 1459, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1507, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton am 1. November 1440 in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton 25 und seine Mutter Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford 15. Er hat am 2. Juni 1459 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Catherine Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1507 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton è nato il il 1 novembre 1440 nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Douglas il 2 giugno 1459, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 ottobre 1507, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccartonが1440年11月1日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで生まれた時，父Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccartonは25歳，母Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawfordは15歳であった。1459年6月2日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでCatherine Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1507年10月7日に故郷で66歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton(이)가 1440년 11월 1일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1459년 6월 2일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Catherine Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1507년 10월 7일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에 묻혔다.

pt.1 NOV 1440–7 Oct 1507: 1 de novembro de 1440–7 de outubro de 1507
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1440, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Douglas em 2 de junho de 1459, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1507, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton родился 1 ноября 1440 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Douglas 2 июня 1459 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 октября 1507 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.1 NOV 1440–7 Oct 1507: 1 de noviembre de 1440–7 de octubre de 1507
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton nació el 1 de noviembre de 1440, en Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Catherine Douglas el 2 de junio de 1459, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1507, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.
